name: npc-portrait-assets
title: NPC形象素材
creator: lijin
notes: Canonical fallback portrait assets now live under frontend/app/assets/npc-style-cast/portraits/. Added 12 tavern-themed portraits covering merchant/guardian/healer/scholar/wanderer/spirit with deterministic variant selection. TavernNpcStage keeps owner-authored image priority (sprites.neutral > avatar > image_url > project fallback portrait) and no longer crops the old tavern-npc-style-cast style board as runtime fallback. Validation passed: npm --prefix .\frontend run typecheck, build, and test.
